compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Claimed and reproduced live (worktree symfix has .venv inside repo root): test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module FAILed with [repo-local, origin=<repo>/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/yaml/__init__.py]. NOTE: recorded file_impact pointed at src/rebar/llm/tools/resolve_symbol.py which does not exist — the real classifier is grounding_tools.resolve_symbol in src/rebar/llm/pai_tools.py (corrected file_impact). Fix: new module-level _environment_roots() (realpaths of sys.prefix/exec_prefix/base_*, site.getsitepackages()+getusersitepackages(), sysconfig purelib/platlib/stdlib/platstdlib) checked BEFORE the repo-root prefix test; an origin under any env root classifies third-party/stdlib even when the venv sits inside the repo. Added tests: test_resolve_symbol_venv_inside_repo_is_third_party (monkeypatched sys.prefix + resolve_in_environment, origin under repo_root/.venv/.../site-packages -> third-party) and test_resolve_symbol_repo_module_still_repo_local (non-regression: repo source origin stays repo-local). All 7 tests in tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py pass in the venv-inside-repo worktree.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Preflight green in the venv-inside-repo worktree: make lint PASS, make typecheck PASS, make test PASS (6019 passed, 33 skipped, 0:26:56). Pushed for review: Gerrit change 710 https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/710 (Change-Id I941a7f73cefbc0ace620263144cfab40c8a61454, commit 88f1741d5). Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Set up a checkout with its venv INSIDE the repo root (e.g. a worktree bootstrapped per docs/local-dev-env.md: python3 -m venv .venv inside the worktree).
2. Run: python -m pytest tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py::test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module -q

Expected: PASS - yaml resolves with origin classified third-party/stdlib. Actual: FAIL - output reads 'EXISTS: yaml resolves in the installed environment [repo-local, origin=<repo>/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/yaml/__init__.py]' because the classifier treats any origin path under the repo root as repo-local, and site-packages sits under the repo root in this layout. Fails identically on an untouched main checkout (reproduced 2026-07-15); CI passes only because its venv lives outside the checkout. The classifier should exclude virtualenv/site-packages paths from the repo-local classification (e.g. exclude sys.prefix / site.getsitepackages() subtrees) before the repo-root prefix test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The origin classifier treats module origins under the active environment's site-packages as third-party/stdlib even when that directory is inside the repo root. Oracle: the reproduction above passes from a venv-inside-repo checkout.
- [ ] A unit test pins the venv-inside-repo case (monkeypatched origin path under repo_root/.venv/.../site-packages classified third-party).

file_impact.reason: the actual classifier: grounding_tools.resolve_symbol scope classification; add _environment_roots() env-tree exclusion before the repo-root prefix test
pin the venv-inside-repo case + a repo-local non-regression case

compiled_state.title: resolve-symbol tool misclassifies third-party modules as repo-local when the venv lives inside the repo root
